events.title: The Creation
events.description: God created the heavens and the earth, setting the foundation for history.

events.title: The Fall
events.description: Sin enters the world through Adam's disobedience in the garden.

events.title: The Flood
events.description: Global flood destroys humanity except Noah's family.

events.title: The Curse on Canaan
events.description: Noah curses Canaan with servitude following Ham's sinful disrespect.

events.title: Tower of Babel Dispersion
events.description: Humanity is scattered across the earth and languages are confused.

events.title: Settlement of Mizraim (Egypt)
events.description: Ham's descendants settle the Nile Delta establishing Egypt.

events.title: Settlement of Cush
events.description: Ham's descendants establish settlements in the Upper Nile Valley.

events.title: Settlement of Phut
events.description: Ham's descendants establish settlements in North Africa and the Sahara.

events.title: Rise of the 25th Dynasty
events.description: Cushite Pharaohs rule the entire Nile Valley.
